final_plan:
#Task1: List all failure modes of Chiller 6 to identify if "excess purge" is among them.
#Agent1: Failure Mode and Sensor Relevancy Expert for Industrial Asset
#Dependency1: None
#ExpectedOutput1: A comprehensive list of failure modes of Chiller 6.

#Task2: Identify the relevant sensors for monitoring the "excess purge" failure mode of the purge unit of Chiller 6.
#Agent2: Failure Mode and Sensor Relevancy Expert for Industrial Asset
#Dependency2: #S1
#ExpectedOutput2: A list of relevant sensors that can be used to monitor the "excess purge" failure mode.

#Task3: Analyze the time-series data from the relevant sensors identified in Task 2 to look for anomalies or patterns that could indicate "excess purge".
#Agent3: Time Series Analytics and Forecasting
#Dependency3: #S2
#ExpectedOutput3: An analysis report highlighting any anomalies or patterns in the data that could be indicative of "excess purge".

#Task4: Create a work order for inspecting or maintaining the purge unit of Chiller 6 based on the findings from Task 3.
#Agent4: WorkOrder Agent
#Dependency4: #S3
#ExpectedOutput4: A work order for preventive or corrective maintenance of the purge unit of Chiller 6.
